ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a reference to Donato Antonio Altomare see Petri Salii Diversi, Annotationes in Librum Donati Antonii Ab Altomare, Bononiae, 1584 (British Library Shelfmark: 1167.h.6.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
